visual_description: Two figures are seen embracing in a dimly lit, cavernous space with large, serpent-like sculptures flanking the sides. The camera then pulls back to reveal a lone figure standing in the center of a dark tunnel, facing a massive, carved face at the far end. The figures are mostly silhouetted, with minimal visible detail due to the low lighting.
